long_chain: Intensify the sunset colors to deep crimson and vibrant orange, making the sun's reflection on the water brighter and more golden.
Add scattered cumulus clouds in the sky illuminated by the setting sun, adding depth and texture to the upper atmosphere.
Enhance the details of the shoreline silhouette, revealing the distinct shapes of the buildings and construction machinery more clearly against the light.
Transform the water surface to be smoother and glass-like, elongating the sun's reflection into a solid, shimmering pillar of light.
Introduce a flock of seagulls flying low over the water in the middle ground, adding a sense of movement and life to the scene.
Apply a vintage film aesthetic with warm grain, a slight vignette, and soft focus to give the seascape a nostalgic, retro feel.
Add a layer of low-lying sea mist hovering just above the water, partially obscuring the base of the distant shore and softening the horizon line.
Shift the shadow colors in the water and lower sky to a cool teal and cyan tone, creating a striking complementary contrast with the warm orange sun.
Add a weathered wooden pier structure in the bottom left foreground, extending diagonally into the water to provide a leading line.
Populate the upper sky with a scattering of faint stars, suggesting the transition from sunset to early night while the sun remains just above the horizon.
